semantic_setup.description: Global semantic install status. Horizontal core answers may live directly here; domain-specific answers should point to the owning skill data file.

sources.description: Horizontal core source pointers used across many skills, such as tasks, memory/context, calendar, routine run records, and optional knowledge/context sources. Store pointers/access notes, not raw exported data.

memory.description: Pointer to the runtime's durable memory/context source plus agent-facing usage instructions. Store how to use memory, not raw memory dumps.

answer.description: Runtime pointer or short source description.

decision_kind.description: Structured setup decision kind so agents do not have to infer policy from prose.

usage.description: Agent-facing instructions for reading/updating the memory source.

read_policy.description: Preferred retrieval order or read rules.

write_policy.description: Whether writes are allowed, approval-gated, or forbidden.

runtime_inventory.description: Dynamic runtime capability inventory. Stores where to discover skills/tools/adapters, which capabilities exist, and which watch targets are active. This is a map for dynamic heartbeat decisions, not a fixed checklist or raw data store.

context_now.description: Mechanical coordination state for context-now, such as which short signal pointers were already surfaced and which deferred pointers should be shown on the next assistant turn. Store compact public-safe pointers, not raw runtime data.

policies.description: Horizontal Life OS policies such as schedule, delivery, trigger default, and approval behavior. Domain-specific preferences belong in the owning skill data file.
